title: lastrea filix-mas var. subtriangularis
intro: Lastrea filix-mas var. subtriangularis, a variant of the male fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lastrea filix-mas var. subtriangularis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and processing the fronds, which can be made into teas, infusions, or applied topically as a poultice.
